title: rivea argentea
intro: Rivea argentea, also known as moonflower or night-blooming cereus, is a tropical vine belonging to the family Convolvulaceae. It is native to Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, due to its sedative and anxiolytic properties. Herbal preparations of Rivea argentea include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate insomnia, stress, and other sleep disorders.
